summary: All four requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 (remove Technician Signature) is confirmed by the file summaries stating no signature section exists. REQ-2 (multi-photo upload) is implemented via the PhotoEntry interface and multi-photo state. REQ-3 (per-photo labels in form and PDF) is implemented with label fields on PhotoEntry and PhotoData in pdfGenerator. REQ-4 (HELPER → ASSIS TECHNICIAN) is confirmed by file summaries referencing 'Assis Technician' label in both files. No missing requirements or hallucinated features were found.
